plugins.name: claude-code
plugins.description: Operate Claude Code itself — context control, plan/thinking modes, hooks, custom slash commands, subagents, MCP. Distilled from the Claude Code in Action course and grounded in this workspace's vendored src/ internals.

plugins.name: claude-api
plugins.description: Build with the Anthropic Messages API — requests, streaming, system prompts, structured output, tool use, evals, and RAG. Distilled from the Building with the Claude API course.

plugins.name: claude-deployments
plugins.description: Run Claude on Amazon Bedrock and Google Cloud Vertex AI — access, requests, tool use, and the deltas from the first-party API. Distilled from the Bedrock and Vertex AI courses.

plugins.name: model-context-protocol
plugins.description: Build MCP servers and clients — tools, resources, prompts, sampling, roots, and the stdio / Streamable HTTP transports. Distilled from the MCP intro and advanced courses.

plugins.name: claude-cowork
plugins.description: Work with Claude Cowork — folder scoping, connectors, the permissions model, matching tasks to modes, scheduled tasks, and dispatch. Distilled from the Introduction to Claude Cowork course.

plugins.name: ai-fluency
plugins.description: Teach and apply the AI Fluency framework (Delegation, Description, Discernment, Diligence — the 4Ds) for educators and students. Distilled from the AI Fluency for Educators / Students and Teaching AI Fluency courses.
